  "why_this_plan_zh": [
    "固定收益类产品提供稳定现金流，降低组合波动",

    "控制权益仓位避免市场大幅波动带来的损失",
    "政策导向行业享受政策红利，防御性板块在不确定环境中表现稳健",

  "why_this_plan_en": [
    "Fixed-income products provide stable cash flow and reduce portfolio volatility",
    "Quality blue-chips and industry leaders offer resilience and long-term growth potential",
    "Controlled equity exposure limits losses from market fluctuations",
    "Policy-supported sectors benefit from government initiatives; defensive segments perform well in uncertain environments",
    "Diversification reduces single-asset risk and balances risk-return profile"
  ]
